rows.label: tev020301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev020301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Alice about the attack on Earth.

rows.label: tev020301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev020301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Alice if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev020301_SEL1011
rows.name:
Ask Alice for her thoughts on
the people living in NLA.

rows.label: tev020301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Alice about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020301_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Alice about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020301_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Alice about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0001
rows.name:
We had a radio in the evacuation shelter
that let us hear daily reports about various
countries and cities being destroyed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0002
rows.name: It was...terrifying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Then one day, xenoforms appeared in
the city where Eliza and I lived.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0004
rows.name:
It was over before we even knew it
was happening. They came in and
reduced the entire city to ash.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0005
rows.name:
I always thought that extraterrestrials would be our
friends, you know? Bring peace and medicine and
science and things like that. Not...kill everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0010
rows.name:
I have a lot of respect for Eliza. I wish
that everyone would go hear her speak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0011
rows.name:
But no one seems interested in listening
to her. I guess everyone's too preoccupied
with survival to care about such things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you ever have the chance, however,
you should talk with Eliza yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG0013
rows.name:
I know you'd be super moved by what she
has to say. She's so kind, and so smart![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1001
rows.name:
I wonder if there are lots of other people
like Alex? You know—ones who can't accept
the decisions BLADE HQ has made?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1002
rows.name:
If those sorts of people were to go on
a rampage in NLA, our giant defensive
walls wouldn't be worth diddily-poo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1003
rows.name: No... I'm not going to think like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1004
rows.name:
Eliza says I can't just go
around distrusting everyone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1005
rows.name:
She says I should believe in
my fellow humans and be
optimistic about our future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1010
rows.name:
Eliza's thinking about having
a big public speech soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1011
rows.name:
Even though it's been a while since the
xenoforms came to NLA, there are still loads
of people who hold prejudices towards them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1012
rows.name:
She hopes that her speech can convince
everyone to finally get along with each
other. ...I wonder if that's really possible?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1013
rows.name: Well, if anyone can do it, Eliza can![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG1014
rows.name:
I know that everyone will be moved
by her words and change the way
they think. I just know it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG2001
rows.name:
Eliza's starting to get used to her replacement
Blue Blood, and should be able to leave the
maintenance center soon. I'm so relieved![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG2002
rows.name:
Listen, I'm going to find out who it
was that arranged the attack on Eliza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG2003
rows.name:
When I do, will you find the
bastard and help apprehend them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG2004
rows.name:
We don't have the power to do things
like that ourselves. We need your help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG3001
rows.name:
According to Chacha, Alex was in league
with those weirdos from the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG3002
rows.name:
What do you think they were hoping to
accomplish by deceiving humans like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG3003
rows.name: It scares me just thinking about it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG3004
rows.name:
We all have to learn to trust each
other so they can't drive such
wedges between us ever again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020301_MSG3005
rows.name:
And I'm going to do everything I can to
help Eliza make that dream a reality![ST:wait ]
